html:
Exclusive to:  

Asparagus is a Vegetable Food Item introduced in the Hamlet DLC. It can both be found growing naturally in the world and be obtained through Farming. Asparagus restores 12.5 Hunger when eaten raw, compared to 25 hunger eaten cooked, which makes it a much better item cooked than raw (as both restore 3 health anyway). The only disadvantage is that the spoilage time is cut in half after being cooked, which makes it advisable to cook asparagus when around halfway through its perishing time to preserve the beneficial properties of cooked asparagus for as long as possible.

Cooked Asparagus

Cooked Asparagus is a Vegetable food item created by Cooking Asparagus using any structures or items that turn raw foods into their independently cooked counterparts, such as Campfires, Fire Pits, Dwarf Stars, etc.

 Usage

Recipe

×0.5

×2

×1.5

Trivia

  • Asparagus was introduced to Don't Starve Together in the Warly Character Update.

“A vegetable.”
–Wilson
“They're all chewy like this. They need fire.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang always eat his vegetables.”
–Wolfgang
“Vegetables are good for you, but what do I care?”
–Wendy
“SMALL TREES OF ENERGY ACQUIRED”
–WX-78
“A great source of dietary fibre.”
–Wickerbottom
“Almost as tough as trees like this.”
–Woodie
“We must always eat our vegetables.”
–Maxwell
“These fibrous shoots will undoubtedly cause me stomach upset.”
–Wagstaff
“Vegetable! I shall nöt cönsume thee!”
–Wigfrid
“Mom said we should eat our vegetables.”
–Webber
“It's like they're wearing little vegetable hats.”
–Walani
“Sparrow grass!”
–Warly
“Lil' vegetable masts.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS TEENY SPEAR O' NUM NUMS”
–Wilba
“Sticks for belly”
–Wormwood
“I always eat my vegetables. Or launch them out the Pew-matic.”
–Wheeler
“Makes ya big and strong.”
–Winona
“A spear I guess. Hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Snack sticks!”
–Wurt
“It's not my favourite.”
–Walter
“One must stay healthy if they want to live to a ripe old age.”
–Wanda
Asparagus is a Vegetable Food Item introduced in the Hamlet DLC. It can both be found growing naturally in the world and be obtained through Farming. Asparagus restores 12.5 Hunger when eaten raw, compared to 25 hunger eaten cooked, which makes it a much better item cooked than raw (as both restore 3 health anyway). The only disadvantage is that the spoilage time is cut in half after being cooked, which makes it advisable to cook asparagus when around halfway through its perishing time to preserve the beneficial properties of cooked asparagus for as long as possible.
Cooked Asparagus[edit | edit source]
“Science says it's good for me.”
–Wilson
“Not so chewy now, are you?”
–Willow
“Vegetables make Wolfgang big and strong.”
–Wolfgang
“I could eat it. If I felt like eating anything.”
–Wendy
“IMPROVED BY FAST OXIDATION”
–WX-78
“It releases sulfur compounds when it's digested.”
–Wickerbottom
“Little easier to eat them like this.”
–Woodie
“Smells terrible.”
–Maxwell
“High in vitamin A and dietary fibre. I find it pleasing to consume.”
–Wagstaff
“Fire döth nöt make thine möre palatable!”
–Wigfrid
“Asparagus makes my pee smell funny.”
–Webber
“I'm gonna eat it!”
–Walani
“Roasted asparagus. What a treat!”
–Warly
“It fills Woodleg's belly.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS FWOOSH'DED TEENY SPEAR”
–Wilba
“Smells pointy”
–Wormwood
“Smells surprisingly good.”
–Wheeler
“I'm not fussy.”
–Winona
“I'd rather not.”
–Wortox
“Hot snack sticks!”
–Wurt
“I'll eat my vegetables.”
–Walter
“Not quite as crisp anymore.”
–Wanda
Cooked Asparagus is a Vegetable food item created by Cooking Asparagus using any structures or items that turn raw foods into their independently cooked counterparts, such as Campfires, Fire Pits, Dwarf Stars, etc.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Măng Tây là một Thực Phẩm Rau Củ được giới thiệu trong Hamlet DLC. Nó có thể được tìm thấy mọc tự nhiên trên thế giới và có được thông qua việc Farming. Măng tây phục hồi 12,5 điểm đói khi ăn sống, so với 25 điểm đói khi nấu chín, điều này khiến nó trở thành một món ăn nấu chín tốt hơn nhiều so với sống (vì cả hai đều phục hồi 3 máu). Nhược điểm duy nhất là thời gian hư hỏng giảm đi một nửa sau khi nấu chín, điều này nên nấu măng tây khi còn khoảng nửa thời gian hư hỏng để bảo quản các đặc tính có lợi của măng tây đã nấu chín càng lâu càng tốt.

'''Asparagus''' is a [[Vegetable]] [[Food]] [[Item]] introduced in the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It can both be found growing naturally in the world and be obtained through [[Farm]]ing. Asparagus restores 12.5 [[Hunger]] when eaten raw, compared to 25 [[hunger]] eaten cooked, which makes it a much better item cooked than raw (as both restore 3 health anyway). The only disadvantage is that the spoilage time is cut in half after being cooked, which makes it advisable to cook asparagus when around halfway through its perishing time to preserve the beneficial properties of cooked asparagus for as long as possible.
